subject: [PATCH 05/19] sunrpc: defer rq_argp and rq_resp free until after RCU grace period

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a use-after-free bug in the sunrpc code by deferring the freeing of rq_argp and rq_resp until after an RCU grace period, ensuring that any RCU readers have finished accessing these resources before they are freed. The patch introduces a new call_rcu callback to free these resources asynchronously, alongside the existing kfree_rcu for the svc_rqst struct.
